title: kibatalia anceps
intro: Kibatalia anceps, also known as the Philippine mahogany or Philippine black ebony, is a plant species in the family Ebenaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Kibatalia anceps include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infused in hot water to make a tea, which is used to treat various ailments, while its leaves and bark are also used to make herbal preparations such as infusions and ointments.
